# Review Reminder Rules

This reference explains the weekly, monthly, and yearly review reminders used by `ah-note`.

## Date Detection

Always calculate the current date with an actual date API or command. Do not guess or hard-code dates.

Rules:

- Saturday: first weekly review reminder
- Sunday: second weekly review reminder or auto-add
- Second-last day of the month: first monthly review reminder
- Last day of the month: second monthly review reminder or auto-add
- December 30: first yearly review reminder
- December 31: second yearly review reminder

Use a real date calculation so leap years and month lengths are handled correctly.

## Weekly Review Reminder

On Saturday, ask whether to add the weekly review to today's tasks. Options:

1. Add to today's tasks
2. Skip this week
3. Remind tomorrow

On Sunday, auto-add only if the user asked to be reminded tomorrow or Saturday's daily note was not created. Do not remind again if the user skipped this week.

## Monthly Review Reminder

On the second-last day of the month, ask whether to add the monthly review to today's tasks.

On the last day of the month, auto-add only if the user asked to be reminded tomorrow or the previous daily note was not created.

## Yearly Review Reminder

On December 30, ask whether to add yearly review preparation.

On December 31, auto-add only if needed and remind the user to close the year.
